name: Example Bookstore System
description: A sample multi-repo bookstore application used to demonstrate DreamGraph's cognitive dreaming capabilities. Replace this with your own system overview.

repositories.name: bookstore-api
repositories.purpose: Handles all business logic, auth, and data persistence

repositories.name: bookstore-web
repositories.purpose: Storefront, search, cart, checkout, user account

architecture: Monorepo with shared types. API serves REST endpoints consumed by the web frontend. PostgreSQL for persistence. Stripe for payments.
